Experience &
achievements

i2 Energy
Technology and Digital Initiatives · Damansara, Selangor · On-site

A renewable energy company specialising in industrial and commercial solar, AI IoT systems, building energy management systems, construction management systems, solar farms, and battery energy storage systems.

Current May 2024 – Present
Business Intelligence
Designed and maintained the i2 Energy Project Management System Power BI dashboard, providing real-time visibility into a RM 27.3M solar PV project pipeline across multiple PICs, clients, and installation sites nationwide.
Built a Gantt-based construction tracker covering 15 project stages from site assessment to client handover for over 30 active solar PV projects.
Tracked pending versus acquired revenue across stage-based invoice milestones, supporting collections and cash flow planning decisions.
Designed DAX measures and star schema data models to produce KPIs for senior management reporting.
Business Development
Supported business development efforts across industrial and commercial solar segments, contributing to client acquisition and pipeline growth.
Assisted in proposal preparation, client presentations, and project scoping for solar PV, BESS, and BEMS solutions.
Collaborated with the technical team to align business offerings with client operational requirements and energy targets.
AI and IoT
Worked with IoT platforms including Wattif, Thingario, RadixIoT, and TDengine for real-time solar site monitoring and data collection.
Explored AI-driven analytics applications for predictive maintenance and operational efficiency in the energy sector.
Contributed to IoT hardware and firmware setup for solar monitoring systems across multiple client sites.
Marketing
Led digital marketing initiatives across LinkedIn, Meta, and Google platforms to build brand presence in the B2B energy sector.
Produced content, case studies, and campaign materials to communicate the company's solar and energy solutions to target audiences.
Managed marketing analytics and performance reporting to inform campaign strategy and budget allocation.
Field Work — Operations and Maintenance Monitoring
Participated in on-site activities across solar PV installation projects, including site assessments, installation support, and commissioning monitoring.
Monitored system performance data post-installation to identify anomalies, flag maintenance requirements, and ensure SLA compliance.
Coordinated between field teams and management to relay real-time project status and resolve operational blockers.
Tenggara Fresh
Senior Consultant · Johor Bahru, Johor · Hybrid

An F&B company selling organic fruits and vegetables, processed fruit and vegetable products, and agricultural products including organic fertilisers and plant health products, with ongoing research into soil health and beneficial bacteria.

Completed Nov 2024 – Mar 2025
Business Development
Played a central role in launching the business from the ground up, including the full development and go-to-market of its F&B and agricultural product lines.
Developed product positioning, pricing strategy, and distribution channels for organic fruit and vegetable products and agricultural inputs.
Advised on market trends in the organic and sustainable agriculture sector, helping align the company's product portfolio with consumer demand and regulatory direction.
Built partnerships and explored retail, wholesale, and direct-to-consumer channels to support business growth and revenue diversification.
Marketing
Led brand development and visual identity creation for Tenggara Fresh from inception, establishing a cohesive brand presence across all consumer and trade touchpoints.
Planned and executed digital and physical marketing campaigns to introduce the brand and its products to target markets in Malaysia.
Managed social media presence and content production to grow awareness and engagement around the company's organic and agricultural offerings.

Infrastructure University Kuala Lumpur · Malaysia · Hybrid

A private university in Malaysia offering undergraduate and postgraduate programmes across engineering, business, computing, and the arts.

Completed Mar 2019 – Dec 2023 4 yrs 10 mos
Marketing

Created a comprehensive brand book used as the authoritative guide for maintaining brand consistency across the university's departments and external communications.
Played a key role in curating and producing content for academic symposiums, cultural festivals, and student engagement events.
Operational Efficiency
Automated the university's sales pipeline workflows, reducing manual administration and improving the speed and accuracy of enrolment-related communications.
Implemented and configured student management system improvements that streamlined internal processes across admissions, academic tracking, and student services.
Introduced digital tools and workflow automation that reduced repetitive administrative tasks across departments, improving overall operational efficiency.

Content Writer and Copy Editor · University of Calgary · Remote

One of Canada's leading engineering schools, part of the University of Calgary, conducting research across energy, environment, biomedical engineering, and advanced computing.

Academic Writing and Research Communication
